contact.heading: Connect with me
contact.message: Have something to share, collaborate on, or just want to say hello? I'd love to hear from you.

books.title: Those Late Night Walks And Conversations
books.subtitle: Plays · work in progress

chapters.title: A road to clarity
chapters.content:
Chlo aaj shaam ko ek lambi walk par chlte hai
Milne ka plan banate hai
4 baje shaam ko mil sakte ho
Tum aate hue dikhe mujhe main thi vahaan.. par hamesha ki tarha tumhara intezaar kr rahi thi
Door se tumhari aankhon mein ek jhijhak thi
Tum aaye main gale milaane ko badhi aur tum haath milaane ko
Awkward ho gaya maine bola
Tumne bhi muskura diya
Hamne bhi chlna shuru krdiya
Kyun kiya pata nahi.. par shyd manzil pata thi
Ek gehri sadak jo yun hi seedhi chali jaa rahi thi
Hamare beech vo 1 feet ki doori saaf batla rahi thi ki..  tumhare aankhon ki jhijhak ka kya matlab tha
Tumhari vo chuppi
Tumhara vo nazrein churana
Tumhara vo kuch bahane banana
Aaj pata nahi mujhe vo 1ghanta bahut lamba laga
Har ek pal bahut mehenga pad raha tha
Walk khtm hui
Vo gale lagane badha
Maine bhi haath aage badhaya
Fir awkwardness..
Par is baar meri taraf se acceptance bhi thi
Maine kahan tumhe jaana chaiye andhera ho raha hai
Usne bhi jaate jaate poocha
Aur tum,
Maine kahaan main toh hamesha ki tarha intezaar karungi
Pehle tumhare jaldi aane ka..
Ab tumhare vapas laut aane ka.

chapters.title: From Sitting Beside to Falling in Love
chapters.content:
From sitting next to each other,
To going to the library together.
From sitting in front of each other,
To sitting beside and resting on your shoulder.

From watching you say you love wildflowers,
To plucking them and wearing them for hours.
From your nonstop talks about GPUs,
To you teasing me softly with your shoes.

From our random, unplanned dates,
To your hints with that double-decker bus song mention
And my hints through those "non-veg question
All those moments, my heart still fits.

I was happy when you weren't here,
But I'm happier now that you're near.
It's because of you — your pure heart,
The way you never tried to own any part.

You let me be free, like a bird in the sky,
Yet I keep coming back, I don't know why.
Oh, speaking of birds, I still recall,
Us watching bats behind the hostel

From spotting our favorite couples at night,
Every little memory glows so true,
Because each one begins with you.

You took me to the lake for that serene view,
But you know what my favourite view is?
It's you.

From two souls chasing their dreams apart,
To two hearts cheering for each other's start.
I love everything about you,
Every smile, every word, everything you do.

We confessed once and then chose "just friends,"
But my feelings don't seem to end.
I looked at you too deeply to be just friends
So here's my question, before this poem ends:

Can I call you my boyfriend… from now on, till the end

chapters.title: Haan chaand ne mujhse sawaal kar hi liya..
chapters.content:
Aaj chaand ne hamse sawaal kr hi liya..
Ahaan,hamse mera mtlb hai main khud akele aur mujhme shaamil tum..

Khair chodo..

To main kahaan thi, haan
Ki aaj jab meri chaand se mulakaat hui,

Aur uske jaane ka vakht ho gaya
Mera mtlb hai apni mohabbat mein ek aur raat guzaar kar,
Jab suraj ka agaaz hone laga,subha ki roshni aankhein roshan krne lagi

To chaand ne  mujhse pooch hi liya..
Ki apne chaand par itna kyun itraate ho
Maine bhi bahut akadkr, ithlakar aur kuch sharmakar keh hi diya, kyunki mera chaand bedaag hai.

Vo bhi kahaan maanne vaala tha
Usne fir pooch liya ki main toh har shaam ko aate hi dhalne lagta hu

Ye kaisa ishq kar baithi tum,

Maine bhi muskuraakar keh hi diya..
Kisi se dilkashi toh kisi ka uns kahaan poora hota hai..
Har dhalti sham,andheri raat ka ek savera hota hai

Haan aaj chaand ne meri kasak bhari muskaan dekhkr mujhse ek sawaal kr hi liya...
